description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: No School - Presidents Day
events.description: School closed for Presidents Day holiday weekend from February 12th to February 16th.

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Two authors will visit the school. If students would like to order books and have them signed on the day of the visit, please place orders through Rakestraw Bookstore using the school's shipping address. The books will be delivered to the school on the day of the visit for signing.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and Kindergarten students only. A showcase featuring what students have been working on in music class with Mrs. Gold. There will be a livestream of the showcase for anyone who cannot attend in person; a link will be sent out a few days before the event.
